exploration_notes: In Kubernetes v1.32.0, the in-tree CNI plugin code (formerly in pkg/kubelet/dockershim/network/cni/) was removed along with dockershim in v1.24. CNI integration is now fully delegated to the container runtime via CRI (Container Runtime Interface). The key files are: (1) kuberuntime_sandbox.go — creates pod sandboxes triggering CNI via CRI's RunPodSandbox, generates sandbox config with network namespace/port mappings, and determines pod IPs from sandbox status (IPAM results); (2) kuberuntime_mana
